  "findings": [
    "Shackle is side-loaded, which significantly reduces its rated working load limit (WLL) and introduces bending stress on the pin."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop rigging operations immediately.",
    "Reconfigure the rigging connection using a spreader bar, master link, or proper shackle alignment to ensure in-line loading."
  ],
  "rationale": "Rigging shackles are designed for in-line loading. Side-loading a shackle reduces its rated capacity (up to 50% at a 90-degree angle) and can cause catastrophic failure of the pin or bow under load, violating ASME B30.26 and OSHA standards.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.26",
    "OSHA 1926.251"
  ]
}
